  :root {
    --font-body-family: "Titillium Web", sans-serif;
    --font-body-style: normal;
    --font-body-weight: 400;

    --font-heading-family: "Titillium Web", sans-serif;
    --font-heading-style: normal;
    --font-heading-weight: 400;

    --font-body-scale: 1.0;
    --font-heading-scale: 1.0;

    --font-navigation-family: var(--font-heading-family);
    --font-navigation-size: 13px;
    --font-navigation-weight: var(--font-heading-weight);
    --font-button-family: var(--font-heading-family);
    --font-button-size: 13px;
    --font-button-baseline: 0rem;
    --font-price-family: var(--font-heading-family);
    --font-price-scale: var(--font-heading-scale);

    --color-base-text: 33, 35, 38;
    --color-base-background: 255, 255, 255;
    --color-base-solid-button-labels: 255, 255, 255;
    --color-base-outline-button-labels: 26, 27, 24;
    --color-base-accent: 26, 27, 24;
    --color-base-heading: 26, 27, 24;
    --color-base-border: 255, 255, 255;
    --color-placeholder: 255, 255, 255;
    --color-overlay: 33, 35, 38;
    --color-keyboard-focus: 255, 198, 48;
    --color-shadow: 255, 198, 48;
    --shadow-opacity: 1;

    --color-background-dark: 235, 235, 235;
    --color-price: #1a1b18;
    --color-sale-price: #ffc630;
    --color-sale-badge-background: #ffc630;
    --color-reviews: #ffc630;
    --color-critical: #d72c0d;
    --color-success: #008060;
    --color-highlight: 255, 198, 48;

    --payment-terms-background-color: #ffffff;
    --page-width: 160rem;
    --page-width-margin: 0rem;

    --card-color-scheme: var(--color-placeholder);
    --card-text-alignment: center;
    --card-flex-alignment: center;
    --card-image-padding: 2px;
    --card-border-width: 4px;
    --card-radius: 0px;
    --card-shadow-horizontal-offset: 0px;
    --card-shadow-vertical-offset: 0px;
    
    --button-radius: 0px;
    --button-border-width: 2px;
    --button-shadow-horizontal-offset: 0px;
    --button-shadow-vertical-offset: 0px;

    --spacing-sections-desktop: 0px;
    --spacing-sections-mobile: 0px;

    --gradient-free-ship-progress: linear-gradient(325deg,#F9423A 0,#F1E04D 100%);
    --gradient-free-ship-complete: linear-gradient(325deg, #049cff 0, #35ee7a 100%);
  }

  *,
  *::before,
  *::after {
    box-sizing: inherit;
  }

  html {
    box-sizing: border-box;
    font-size: calc(var(--font-body-scale) * 62.5%);
    height: 100%;
  }

  body {
    min-height: 100%;
    margin: 0;

<script>
(function() {
  const slider = document.getElementById('cozy-story-scroll-template--15847555989603__story_slider_4Mpgmq');
  if (!slider) return;
  
  let isDown = false;
  let startX;
  let scrollLeft;
  
  slider.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
    isDown = true;
    slider.style.cursor = 'grabbing';
    slider.style.userSelect = 'none';
    startX = e.pageX - slider.offsetLeft;
    scrollLeft = slider.scrollLeft;
  });
  
  slider.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
    isDown = false;
    slider.style.cursor = 'grab';
  });
  
  slider.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {
    isDown = false;
    slider.style.cursor = 'grab';
  });
  
  slider.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
    if (!isDown) return;
    e.preventDefault();
    const x = e.pageX - slider.offsetLeft;
    const walk = (x - startX) * 2;
    slider.scrollLeft = scrollLeft - walk;
  });
  
  // Mouse wheel horizontal scroll
  slider.addEventListener('wheel', (e) => {
    if (e.deltaY !== 0) {
      e.preventDefault();
      slider.scrollLeft += e.deltaY;
    }
  });
})();
</script>

<style>
.cozy-story-section {
  background: #ffffff;
  padding: 30px 0;
  overflow: visible;
  width: 100%;
}

.cozy-story-scroll {
  display: flex;
  gap: 20px;
  overflow-x: auto;
  overflow-y: visible;
  padding: 15px 20px 20px 20px;
  -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
  scroll-behavior: smooth;
  scrollbar-width: none;
  -ms-overflow-style: none;
  cursor: grab;
}

.cozy-story-scroll:active {
  cursor: grabbing;
}

.cozy-story-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar {
  display: none;
  height: 0;
}

.cozy-story-item {
  flex: 0 0 auto;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: transform 0.2s ease;
}

.cozy-story-img-wrapper {
  position: relative;
  padding: 2px;
  background: #f09433;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, 
    #f09433 0%, 
    #e1306c 100%);
  border-radius: 50%;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.cozy-story-img {
  width: 110px;
  height: 110px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: #ffffff;
  padding: 3px;
  position: relative;
}

.cozy-story-img::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: transparent;
  transition: background 0.3s ease;
}

.cozy-story-img img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  border-radius: 50%;
  display: block;
}

.cozy-story-text {
  display: block;
  margin-top: 10px;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #111111;
  text-align: center;
  max-width: 110px;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-overflow: ellipsis;
  white-space: nowrap;
  letter-spacing: 0.3px;
}

/* Hover efekti - Desktop */
@media (hover: hover) {
  .cozy-story-item:hover {
    transform: translateY(-4px);
  }
  
  .cozy-story-item:hover .cozy-story-img-wrapper {
    box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
    transform: scale(1.05);
  }
  
  .cozy-story-item:hover .cozy-story-text {
    color: #000000;
  }
}

/* Active state - Touch devices */
.cozy-story-item:active {
  transform: scale(0.97);
}

/* Tablet - Medium screens */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
  .cozy-story-scroll {
    gap: 18px;
    padding: 12px 16px 18px 16px;
  }
  
  .cozy-story-img {
    width: 100px;
    height: 100px;
  }
  
  .cozy-story-text {
    font-size: 12px;
    max-width: 100px;
  }
}

/* Mobile - Small screens */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .cozy-story-section {
    padding: 20px 0;
  }
  
  .cozy-story-scroll {
    gap: 16px;
    padding: 10px 15px 15px 15px;
  }
  
  .cozy-story-img {
    width: 90px;
    height: 90px;
  }
  
  .cozy-story-text {
    font-size: 11px;
    margin-top: 8px;
    max-width: 90px;
  }
}

/* Extra small mobile */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
  .cozy-story-scroll {
    gap: 14px;
    padding: 10px 12px 15px 12px;
  }
  
  .cozy-story-img {
    width: 80px;
    height: 80px;
  }
  
  .cozy-story-text {
    font-size: 10.5px;
    max-width: 80px;
  }
}
